title: User Data Processing Settings

options.title: Analytics
options.text: Collects data on popular pages, clicks on elements, and link navigation. This helps us understand the site's strengths and areas for improvement.

options.title: Session Recording (Webvisor)
options.text: Records a video of cursor movements, scrolling, and clicks. This helps us see how users interact with the interface to improve site quality.

note: Data is processed anonymously; we do not collect passwords or sensitive data. You can change your settings at any time using the link at the bottom of the page.
